creator: panden@gmail.com
text:
I suggest adding "Unix: A History and a Memoir" by Brian Kernighan (https://www.cs.princeton.edu/~bwk/memoir.html) to the B.8. UNIX® History section of the FreeBSD handbook.

Reference:

Kernighan, Brian Unix: A History and a Memoir, Kindle Direct Publishing, 2019. ISBN-13: 978-1695978553
